channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 18, anerley park street lamp damaged, 16th April
item.description:
Damaged street light, Lamp missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Agents Advertising Boards, 16th April
item.description:
Agents repeatedly place unsightly advertising boards here, contrary to planning regulations and despite previous reports and subsequent removals by RGB. The boards are not connected with the adjacent property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac left behind after road resurfacing taken place, 16th April
item.description:
On corner of Holbrook way tarmac left behind after road repairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmcroft Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste bags being dumped and attracting rats!, 16th April
item.description:
This is a constant repeated problem! Every time its cleared, they build up again. They are also being left on the wall. It is now attracting rats!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rolleston Avenue, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 16th April
item.description:
This pothole has been here for several weeks. It was marked up in white spray paint but has not been filled in. Cars are being damaged by stones being dislodged from the hole when cars drive by past. Please advise a timeline for repair. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 16th April
item.description:
Van abandoned since February and not moved…. Blocking 2 valuable vehicle spaces…. Please look into this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craigton Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two damaged public benches, 16th April
item.description:
One bench has one missing slats while the second has two missing slats. Unsightly and uncomfortable to sit on. Have been in this state for many months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Banks Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items, furniture, 16th April
item.description:
Hi, again someone emptied their house by general bins. Please help Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Fly tipping in and by a blue recycling bin that needs to be emptied and cleared. Obstructing the pavement and encouraging people to drop litter on and around it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: CCTV camera action required URGENT- Fly Tipping EVERY DAY, 16th April
item.description:
Every single day someone dump garbage outside property. Most of the times disgusting and contaminated stuff Hackney council is required an urgent action. Willing to report it further ideally to HSE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tyres and other waste, 16th April
item.description:
Dumped waste on bull lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bull Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harris fencing falling down, 16th April
item.description:
The landscaping took place last year however the Harris fencing was never removed and now it is all starting to fall over please can it be removed? It’s dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delacourt Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bag, 16th April
item.description:
Someone had dumped some rubbish bags which tonight looks like has been ripped and litter all over road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Totnes Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grey Audi 4x4 Without Numberplate Left for A Week+, 16th April
item.description:
See title
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 160, Acre Lane, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Medical waste bags dumped, 16th April
item.description:
Belvedere court has 3 entrances. Over last 3 weeks we have seen a large number of yellow bags marked medical waste left outside alternating entrances by the doors to the locked bin cupboards. All residents have keys to these cupboards so seems like flytipp

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Contents of house dumped on green, 16th April
item.description:
Fly tip from house has been there at least 3 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, St Katherines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge wood and partial sofa, 16th April
item.description:
The sofa was flytipped across the road and had been reported now half of it is on this side and has attracted a chair a fridge some wood etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged children’s play area, 16th April
item.description:
This is getting ridiculous. This park is getting worse. So many areas are unsafe for the children and now this. This needs fixing urgently before someone gets hurt.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clovelly Way, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 16th April
item.description:
There is a fallen tree branch obstruction on pavement at junction of Wynchgate and Queen Elizabeth Drive.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynchgate, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Genral rubish, 16th April
item.description:
Genral rubish left at side of the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyndham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
